role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of visible text and remained within the domain of script analysis.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, soil, and settlement patterns consistent with the role.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Focused on vegetation types and biome characteristics.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed infrastructure standards (poles, road quality) and lack of signage.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized architectural and infrastructural cues (roofing, shelter style) to distinguish regions.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Ukraine. The agents adhered to their roles, providing grounded evidence for the visual cues (asbestos roofing, concrete poles, bus shelter). The tournament successfully used this evidence to narrow down the post-Soviet candidates, correctly favoring Ukraine over Moldova and Russia.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of flat terrain and vegetation match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Descriptions of deciduous trees and grasses match.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Descriptions of poles and road condition match.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Descriptions of roofing and shelter styles match the visual evidence.
